commit_subject: Input: ad7879 - add check for read errors in interrupt
notes: Single-shot generation produced query targeting unchecked regmap_*_read return values; generalized from regmap_bulk_read to the regmap read family.
Repair iter 1 fixed type errors: FunctionCall.getParent() returns Expr not Stmt; rewrote checks to use ExprStmt for discard detection and per-statement-kind checks for guard contexts.
Removed unused getAChild* on GuardCondition (cpp-all 10.2.0 IRGuards refactor).
Final compile: clean (only deprecation warnings about DataFlow module, no longer imported).
